description: A customer calls to ask if a specific container has been loaded onto a train that departed yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Get the container number from the customer.
Search the TOS for the container's history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent searches for the container and finds its event log.

nodes.task_description: Confirm from the log that the container was loaded onto a specific train and railcar and provide this information to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the container was loaded onto train T123, car 89, and relays this to the customer.
